title: Skillfold Manifest
description: Declares the skills and rules a project uses. Run "skillfold install" to install them into .claude/skills and .claude/rules and pin exact versions in skillfold.lock.

skills.description: Skills to install, keyed by skill name (the directory name under the skills directory).

oneOf.description: Source string: a local path (./skills/my-skill), github:owner/repo/path@ref, or npm:package/skill-name@version.

version.description: Version pin: a git tag, branch, or commit SHA for GitHub sources; an exact version or dist-tag for npm sources.

compose.description: Generated skills whose body is the concatenation of other skills' bodies, in declared order.

description.description: Frontmatter description of the generated skill.

use.description: Names of skills (or other composed skills) to concatenate, in order.

allowed-tools.description: allowed-tools frontmatter of the generated skill: a comma-separated string or a list of tool names. Default: the union of the used skills' allowed-tools when every one declares a list; omitted (unrestricted) otherwise.

skillsDir.description: Directory to install skills into, relative to the manifest. Default: .claude/skills

rules.description: Rules to install as <rulesDir>/<name>.md, keyed by rule name. Each source points at a single markdown file (local path, github:, or npm:).

additionalProperties.description: Source string of a markdown file: a local path (./rules/style.md), github:owner/repo/path/file.md@ref, or npm:package/path/file.md@version.

rulesDir.description: Directory to install rules into, relative to the manifest. Default: .claude/rules

targets.description: Tools to install for. Default: [claude]. claude installs to .claude/skills and .claude/rules; codex installs skills to .agents/skills and syncs rules into a managed AGENTS.md block.
